title: Formula column - Digits after the decimal point
excerpt: In the Formula column, the number that appears is limited to three digits after the decimal point. Would it be possible to add more digits after the decimal point? We use this function to enter data into another program,…

posts.author: CarolineF (Caroline)
posts.cookedHtml: In the Formula column, the number that appears is limited to three digits after the decimal point. Would it be possible to add more digits after the decimal point? We use this function to enter data into another program, and the result is not always accurate because there are not enough digits after the decimal point. Thank you for your help!

posts.author: rjw (Rick )
posts.cookedHtml: I started researching this as well, have tried formatting formula text and rounding to 5 decimals, but truncates to 3 every time. Hope someone has a solution
